title: Periodate as an Analytical Reagent. Part II. Estimation of Hypophosphite, Phosphite, Selenite, Tellurite and Tellurium
author: R. L. Kaushik
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Sodium metaperiodate has been used for the determination of hypophosphite, phosphite, selenite, tellurite and tellurium present alone or in a mixture of two of the compounds.
steps_raw: Sodium metaperiodate has been used for the determination of hypophosphite, phosphite, selenite, tellurite and tellurium present alone or in a mixture of two of the compounds.
